body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Corrects errors in UniversalFunctions that led to discontinuities at the neutral limit


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->

## Content
* Corrects the (Businger-Dyer) similarity functions for the unstable regime to be continuous at the neutral limit with the stable Gryanik functions (there was an error in how Pr_0 entered that let to discontinuities for small zeta; this caused convergence problems and sensitivities)
* Remove the `tol_neutral` catch that was introduced to deal with the discontinuities; this required one update in a regression test. (Left `tol_neutral` in top-level API for backward compatibility but removed it from internal APIs)
* Corrects the tests for the universal functions to subtract the neutral limit in the stability function integrals (there were errors in the test design that compensated for the code errors)
* Reduces code duplication by defining helpers for the (Businger) unstable limit and re-using them where needed
* Explicitly uses the Businger parameters from ClimaParams for the unstable branches of Gryanik/Grachev, to ensure consistency with the Businger choices (so that changing just the stable branches does not affect the unstable branches)
* Adds docstrings/code comments/documentation to make clearer how papers map to code
* Some performance optimization and avoidance of catastrophic cancelation, e.g., by rewriting a few expressions using `cbrt` and reformulating `(1-x)^a` using `exp` and `log`. 
* Inlining of frequently called (but relatively small) functions to improve performance
* Adds tests for continuity of stability functions at the neutral limit (which surfaced an incorrect formula used in the finite-volume case), for monotonicity, and for linearizations near neutral limit

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: UniversalFunctions corrections and optimizations

body:
Patch release following update to UniversalFunctions in the near-neutral limit (+ additional tests checking continuity and linearisation as `zeta` tends to 0). 

Bug-fix introduced in #206 improves solutions in the near-neutral limit. (`if-else` branches to catch near-neutral stability as zeta approaches zero have now been removed).
title: Patch update: 0.14.1
